## Description

<!-- What does this PR do? Why is this change needed? -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Test improvement

## Testing

- [ ] All existing tests pass (`python -m pytest tests/ -q`)
- [ ] New tests added for the changes
- [ ] Lint passes (`ruff check src/ tests/`)
- [ ] Type check passes (`mypy src/agentassay/`)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have added docstrings for new public functions/classes
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed
- [ ] I have updated CHANGELOG.md if this change affects users
- [ ] I have not introduced any new dependencies without discussion
